speaker: Nina
line: Sounds like my IKEA furniture needs them to, you know, integrate.

speaker: Tina
line: Imagine your smart fridge and coffee maker. An integration test ensures they actually talk,

speaker: Tina
line: so your fridge doesn't order kale when you wanted coffee beans. Teamwork!

speaker: Nina
line: But we test each part individually, right?

speaker: Nina
line: Fridge chills, coffee brews. Why care if they 'chat'?

speaker: Tina
line: Like a party where the DJ and caterer clash. Everything works, just not *together*.

speaker: Nina
line: Ugh, so every connection needs a test?

speaker: Nina
line: My brain's gonna explode thinking about it.

speaker: Tina
line: Not every single one, but critical ones. Meta uses AI!

speaker: Tina
line: It's a super-smart party planner anticipating guest clashes.

speaker: Nina
line: I get the 'no kale with coffee' thing now. Thanks, Tina!

speaker: Tina
line: Anytime, Nina! Keep those smart appliances talking nicely!
